content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty opened weak (-0.47%), IT sector down sharply (-1.87%) on Infosys guidance miss, VIX elevated at 18.89. Global cues negative (US indices -0.4% to -0.9%). Book is already 79% deployed with only INR 14K remaining deployable — focus must be on position management, not new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 75.00,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position at -5.9% but thesis is intact: strong Q4 beat (+35% PAT YoY), sector leader, HDFC Sec target Rs 90. Current SL at Rs 73 is too wide (-10.4% from entry = 0.7% portfolio risk, above budget). Tighten SL to Rs 75 (just below support at 76.95 minus buffer). Keep original target Rs 88."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 984.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "HOLD at current SL (already at breakeven entry 984). Strong Q4 beat, ICICI Sec target Rs 1,350. No change needed — SL already at breakeven, letting target Rs 1,100 play out."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Gold consolidating, defensive hedge for the book given elevated VIX. SL at 119 (-4.9% from entry) acceptable. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1704.81,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Bullish marubozu to 52-week high, +5% unrealized, SL already at 1704.81 (locks in gains). No SL change needed but trim target slightly to Rs 1820 (more achievable given stock at all-time high). Actually keeping SL and target as-is — this is a no-op, converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 strong beat (+27% PAT), at 52w high. SL at 1350 is wide (-4.5%) but position size small. P&L only +0.6%, no trailing trigger yet. Let it develop."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1150.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results tomorrow (Apr 25) — binary event risk. Position at +1.9%, near 52w high. Tighten SL from breakeven 1049 to Rs 1030 (below key support 1032) to give a small buffer around earnings volatility while still protecting against gap-down. Wait — SL can only be tightened (raised for long). Current SL 1049.05; moving to 1030 would LOOSEN. Keeping SL at 1049.05 (breakeven) is prudent. Revising: keep SL 1049.05, no change. Converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Near 52w high, Q4 results Apr 29. Pharma sector strong. SL at 650 (-4.6%) acceptable. P&L only +1.4%, no trail trigger yet."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.58,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Flat position, Q4 results Apr 30. SL 2260 (-4.7%). No trail needed at +0.1%."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Slightly negative P&L, thesis intact (summer peak demand, capacity additions). SL at 388 (-4.1%) acceptable. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Stock trading ~18% above consensus target Rs 177 (valuation stretched), near 52w high with blow-off volume. Q4 results Apr 29 — binary event. Current P&L -1.0%, SL at 202 (-5.6%) slightly wide but thesis intact via summer demand. HOLD for now, will reassess after results."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 75.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL from 73 to 75 to reduce portfolio risk; thesis intact post strong Q4."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven 984; letting target Rs 1100 develop."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, SL at 119 acceptable."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1704.81 locking in gains; target 1880 valid."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Too early to trail, gain only +0.6%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven ahead of tomorrow's Q4 earnings — protected against downside."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 650 appropriate; Q4 Apr 29 is near-term catalyst."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat, no trail trigger."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Thesis intact, SL at 388."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Binary Q4 event Apr 29; SL 202 holds."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "TORNTPOWER, ADANIPOWER, NTPC together form a Power cluster (~15% of book) — already at cluster limit, no more power adds. TATACOMM (breakout on 6.4x volume, Q4 dividend Rs 17.50) is interesting but book is fully deployed. DRREDDY/PHARMABEES/GRANULES cluster already covered via GRANULES. No new entries today given 79% deployment and only INR 14K remaining deployable.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is at 79% deployment (near max 80%), with 10 CNC positions — well diversified but operationally stretched. Multiple Q4 earnings catalysts in the next 5-7 days: AUBANK Apr 25, GRANULES Apr 29, ADANIPOWER Apr 29, HINDUNILVR Apr 30. MAHABANK SL tightened to reduce portfolio risk (was the weakest position). Priority this week: let SLs protect gains, avoid new entries until cash buffer improves via exits or target hits. Cluster watch: 3 power names (TORNTPOWER + NTPC + ADANIPOWER) ~15% of book — at cluster limit."
}
